description: Per-class ancestry composition. For each of HOM_REF / HET / HOM_INV (and RECOMBINANT if n>=3), reports the mean ancestry Q-vector at this locus (from instant_q local ancestry). Useful for spotting one-family-dominates patterns and for the classification axis sample_grouping.
question: Q1

k_used.description: K used for ancestry Q matrix (typically 8)

per_class_ancestry.description: Keys are class labels, values are mean Q vectors of length k_used

dominant_ancestry_by_class.description: which Q component dominates each class (Q1..Q8)

ancestry_divergence_hom_ref_vs_hom_inv.description: L1 distance between mean Q vectors. High = classes come from different ancestral subpopulations (family-driven signal).
